title: Yasuie’s Execution Shakes Wano
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Yasuie, Unknown person #2, Orochi Forces, Toko, Unknown person #3 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: Yasuie’s execution exposes Orochi’s cruelty and the tragedy of the SMILE victims in Ebisu Town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why'd you try to steal so large a sum?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Master open needs cash.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're gonna kill me for this, then hurry up already,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hedge- HOG!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: oden, you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've really picked up a Motley crew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: here. Take it. Whatever you were trying to steal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WhAA AAA?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie! Hakumai's Treasury! It-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And here! Spend this on yourselves. My treat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're giving away more?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have gotta be joking! What sort of trap is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: D'ya like Oden?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 'Course I do! He saved my life!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then use this money take back that life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Learn your manners. Buy books. Educate yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If layabouts like you lot stay as his ministers,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oden's honor will be Naught!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That man will one day be the Shogun of Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: None but the best

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of Wano's Samurai should stand at his side!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all must not only protect your LORD, but the capital itself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eventually, the country itself must rest in your hands!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: you! The Guardian deities of Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Do you hear me?!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: Flower Capital Rasetsu Town, Prison House

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Yasuie's dead! Gyahahahahahahahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Oi! Kick out those fools from ebisu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is wrong with them?! That's downright creepy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: tonoya- Suuuuu!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Aaaaha hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get out of the Capital, you filthy rats!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! We don't want to leave his side!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie was just killed! And these idiots are laughing?!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Daaaaddy! Ahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: This is Shogun Orochi's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gravest sin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Someone happens

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DaAADY! Fufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: To bring people such misery

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yet prevent them from truly expressing it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this is not hell, then... what is?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ZOROJURO, PLEASE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So is smile not just a synthetic devil fruit?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Muha Haha Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: A befit- ting end, Yasuieie!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think you were still ekeing out a miserable existence here, in my wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How very disgraceful of you, hedge- hog!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Or should I say, rat! Muhahaha!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
